name: get_heart_data
description: Retrieve heart-related health data from Withings devices. This includes blood pressure readings (systolic, diastolic, heart rate) from BPM monitors and ECG recordings from ScanWatch. Returns timestamped measurements that can be filtered by date range.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Must be 'getmeas' for blood pressure data. Use meastype filters for heart-specific readings.

parameters.name: meastype
parameters.description: Filter by type. 9=Diastolic BP, 10=Systolic BP, 11=Heart Rate, 135=QRS interval, 136=PR interval, 137=QT interval.

parameters.name: startdate
parameters.description: Start of the date range as a Unix timestamp.

parameters.name: enddate
parameters.description: End of the date range as a Unix timestamp.
